scenario.name: Example Scenario - Tuohikotti
scenario.description: A sample of what BG Clasher could do.

modifiers.name: ATGM shots
modifiers.description: Anti-tank missile shots (Javelin or Stabber) remaining.

modifiers.name: AT shots
modifiers.description: Anti-tank weapon shots (NLAW or RPG) remaining.

modifiers.name: Digging in / Shell scrapes
modifiers.description: Prepared positions giving direct/indirect fire DRM.

levels.label: Digging in: −1 DRM against Direct and Indirect Fire
Shell scrapes: −2 DRM against Direct and Indirect Fire

modifiers.name: Overwatch / OW Activated
modifiers.description: Overwatch posture and whether it has already been triggered this turn.

levels.label: OW Activated: FE cannot be activated again this turn

modifiers.name: Suppressed / Disrupted
modifiers.description: Suppression state from enemy fire, reducing TQ.
